data.body: Box deploy prepped: /opt/rebar is the deploy checkout (has .predeploy/.bak backups = deploys back up). SSM Run Command works. Box healthy: compose-gerrit-1 up 33h, compose-review-bot-1 up. No systemd/cron for compose-up (manual). Plan once #690 lands: update /opt/rebar to main, run infra/scripts/compose-up.sh with REBAR_OPCERT_ENV_ID -> adds opcert service on loopback:8090 + graceful nginx reload (Gerrit unaffected: docker compose up only adds the new service; bad nginx config is rejected keeping old). Then live checks (SigV4 round-trip, unsigned 401/403, guard-less 403). #689/#690/#691 re-voting.
